description:
Offered: every fall
Studio Art. In this class we will explore the expressive possibilities of materials and form with an emphasis on concept and how material affects meaning. Traditional methods will be considered such as modeling, carving, and assembling, as well as some more contemporary methods and materials, such as incorporating found materials into paper clay. We will look at and discuss the art of sculptors working in different media from around the world.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): FA
